title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Selling ebooks in Nigeria can be challenging when PayPal restricts access from certain countries. Many Nigerian digital creators face difficulties in receiving payments from their global audience due to PayPal's restrictions. If you're one of them, you're not alone. But what are your alternatives? This post explores the options available to you, so you can start selling ebooks and getting paid without worrying about PayPal's limitations.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When considering alternatives to PayPal for selling ebooks, options like Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip come to mind. However, these platforms have country-specific restrictions and requirements, which may not be suitable for all creators. On the other hand, the Full Stack Bundle offered by Unchained Commerce provides a complete store infrastructure that includes the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, making it a comprehensive solution for Nigerian digital creators.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal's restrictions on certain countries, including Nigeria, pose a significant challenge for digital creators. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle supports 300+ cryptocurrencies and does not require a PayPal account, making it an attractive option for creators in restricted countries. Additionally, the bundle's focus on cryptocurrency-based transactions eliminates the need for a PayPal account, providing a more flexible payment solution.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, the Full Stack Bundle offers a more favorable solution. With the Core Engine, you can receive instant automated delivery, eliminating the need for manual payment processing. The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics, allowing you to track your sales and make informed decisions. Furthermore, the bundle's focus on cryptocurrency-based transactions reduces the likelihood of payment delays and associated fees.
The Full Stack Bundle's automation capabilities can help you focus on creating more ebooks and growing your business, rather than getting bogged down in manual payment processing.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The Full Stack Bundle's automation capabilities make it an attractive option for Nigerian digital creators. With the Core Engine, you can automate delivery, eliminating the need for manual processing. The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics, allowing you to track your sales and make informed decisions. This automation enables you to focus on creating more ebooks and growing your business, rather than getting bogged down in manual payment processing.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip, and the Full Stack Bundle depends on your specific situation. If you're looking for a comprehensive solution that supports 300+ cryptocurrencies and does not require a PayPal account, the Full Stack Bundle may be the best option for you. With its automation capabilities, real-time analytics, and focus on cryptocurrency-based transactions, it can help you overcome the challenges of selling ebooks in Nigeria without PayPal's limitations.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
With the Full Stack Bundle, you can receive instant automated delivery and track your sales in real-time, all without the need for a PayPal account.
